mission:
Implement safety rails, shared compute protocol, and trace review for autonomous-development.

Read

tasks.title: Create ratchet.py and oracle.py with tests
Create trace_review.py with TraceAnalyzer and tests
Create contrib.py with ContributorProtocol and tests
Enhance auto_update.py with rate limiting, diff review, and
Add trace-review and contrib CLI subcommands
Add auto-review hook in swarm controller cleanup

discoveries: [consolidation-verifier] (report) Verification complete. 2579 tests pass, 1 skipped. Fixed 1 ruff error (unused variable in test_swarm_controller.py:523). All cross-module changes are consistent - models.py new fields (death_time, claimed_at, dead_agent_history) are properly used by controller.py, context.py, and tested. No API mismatches found between agents' changes.

[telegram-fixer] (report) Completed: (1) Verified config.py correctly reads TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env vars -- no bug there. (2) Added request_approval() method to TelegramNotifier with polling loop. (3) Added 5 tests for request_approval (approve/reject/timeout/wrong-chat/poll-error). All 29 notifier tests pass, ruff clean. BLOCKED on Bug 1: swarm/controller.py lines 371-373 has wrong TelegramNotifier constructor call -- needs fix but file is in my avoid list. See discoveries.

[telegram-fixer] (discovery) BUG in swarm/controller.py:371-373 (_handle_escalate): TelegramNotifier is constructed with self._config.notification (doesn't exist) instead of self._config.notifications.telegram. Also passes level='error' instead of priority=NotificationPriority.HIGH. Fix: use `tg = self._config.notifications.telegram; if tg.bot_token and tg.chat_id: notifier = TelegramNotifier(tg.bot_token, tg.chat_id)` and `priority=NotificationPriority.HIGH`. See continuous_controller.py:819-822 for correct pattern. Whichever agent owns controller.py should apply this fix.

[auto-update-pipeline] (report) Completed: (1) Created src/autodev/auto_update.py with AutoUpdatePipeline class -- bridges intel proposals to swarm missions, low-risk auto-launches, high-risk gates via Telegram. (2) Added applied_proposals table to db.py with is_proposal_applied(), record_applied_proposal(), get_applied_proposals() methods. Dedup by title since proposal IDs are regenerated each scan. (3) Added autodev auto-update CLI command with --dry-run, --approve-all, --threshold flags. (4) Created 13 tests covering DB table, pipeline dry-run, auto-launch, dedup, high-risk approval/rejection/skip, CLI parsing. All 2686 tests pass, ruff clean.
